title: Commissioning Engineer
description:
KEY DUTIES & RESPONSIBILITIES

  • Produce commissioning sequence & commissioning plan as per project requirements
  • Liaise with vendors , contractors to prepare testing scripts required for data center equipment and services commissioning and submit them to related authorities
  • Produce Testing and commissioning schedule and analyze commissioning critical path
  • Laise with construction team for commissioning requirements to ensure commissioning milestones are achieved
  • Laise with equipment vendors with their testing equipment set up and their requirements to ensure they can be accommodated on site for testing.
  • Ensure and track the commissioning activities are been carried out as per schedule
  • Track , record and update of commissioning status per weekly basic
  • Chair weekly commissioning meetings with vendors , suppliers , contractor and consultant
  • Issue weekly commissioning reports and commissioning and scripts tracker status
  • Log commission issues and resolve them together with vendors/contractors and suppliers
  • Lead Testing and Commissioning FAT, SAT activities with vendors , contractors and consultants.
  • Consolidate and validate the testing reports and document them per day to day basic
  • Arrange logistic Heaters, Data Loggers , PQA , Test PC, temporary CAC , HAC requirements for Heat Load Test & IST.
  • Support commissioning agent for HLT and IST by leading all vendors , suppliers and contractors.
  • Close out of all T&C issues and hand over the Documents as part of OMM.


JOB REQUIREMENTS

  • Diploma or Bachelor’s Degree in Electrical or Mechanical Engineering, or related field
  • At least 3 years of relevant experience in data center testing and commissioning or a similar role.
  • Recent graduates are encouraged to apply. We are open to tailoring the role to match your strengths and career goals.
  • Knowledge and skills in data center systems and equipment, such as server, storage, network, power, cooling, fire protection and security.
  • Ability to work independently and in a team, with good communication, problem-solving, and analytical skills.
  • Able to travel for oversea (SEA region) assignment if required

postedCompany.description:
ENGIE group is a global reference in low-carbon energy and services. Our purpose is to act to accelerate the transition towards a carbon-neutral world, through reduced energy consumption and more environmentally friendly solutions, reconciling economic performance with a positive impact on people and the planet.


ENGIE RCS is one of the entities under ENGIE South East Asia, a cluster with a fast-growing team of over 2,000 employees with presence in Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand and the Philippines to provide tailor-made integrated solutions for our customers in commercial buildings, industries, and cities.

Using globally leading technologies, we create innovative energy and smart solutions that enhance the performance of home, business, community, and make the world a better place. We act throughout the value chain: strategy, design, engineering, energy-efficient asset construction, digital platforms, operations management, financing syndication and outcome assurance.

A leading construction and engineering company, ENGIE RCS provides a full range of integrated cutting-edge and cost-effective design and construction services including engineering, designing, infrastructure, and installation for commercial, residential and purpose-build industrial buildings such as Data Centres and Offshore E&I.


Our professional team of design and build expertise with deep project management experience, and advanced virtual design and construction (VDC) technology capabilities serve to provide site feasibility studies, Data Centre space planning, building & infrastructure design, and full suite of technical, mechanical, and electrical services. We aim to deliver value-added, smart, reliable, green & energy efficient, quality, and cost-effective solutions that support the successful business and sustainability objectives of our customers.
postedCompany.name: ENGIE RCS PTE. LTD.
